title: Elevated proxy subprocess timeout HasExited check
desc: Admin Eye proxy must distinguish 'process hung' from 'grandchild holds stdout pipe' after WaitForExitAsync 30s cancel
steps: In .NET 8, Process.WaitForExitAsync with redirected stdout/stderr waits for BOTH process exit AND stream EOF
If child exits cleanly but grandchild (daemon) inherits stdout pipe, WaitForExitAsync stalls on stream-EOF half and fires 30s timeout with stdoutDone=False
Fix (ElevatedEyeProxy.cs ExecuteCommand): on OperationCanceledException, call proc.Refresh() + check proc.HasExited. If true, grace-drain streams 2s then return ExitCode=proc.ExitCode as success

Only when HasExited=false is it a true hang -- then kill tree + return -1 with timeout Error. Post-exit 3s drain path also no longer tags Error since grandchild holding pipe is a success case, not retry-worthy
author: claude
